props.title: payments-api elevated 5xx errors
props.short_description: payments-api 5xx spiked to 40% ~13m after the v4.12.0 deploy
props.description: PagerDuty routed High5xxRate to SRE at 14:00 UTC. payments-api (prod, tier-1) is 5xx-ing on ~40% of requests; throughput holds but the error tail drags p99 to 4.2s while p50 stays flat — a code-fault shape. Onset is 13 minutes after release v4.12.0 (13:47). Card auth + capture impacted.

work_notes.author: monitoring.alerting
work_notes.text: PagerDuty routed High5xxRate to SRE — payments-api 5xx spiking to ~40%.

work_notes.author: sre-oncall
work_notes.text: Acked. v4.12.0 shipped 13:47, ~13m before onset — deploy is the leading suspect.

work_notes.author: sre-oncall
work_notes.text: Declared SEV2 — card auth + capture impacted, tier-1 SLO burning.

props.short_description: Deploy payments-api v4.12.0 to prod (intl tax-calc)
props.description: Standard release of payments-api v4.12.0 via Argo Rollouts; bumps the shared taxcalc library to add intl VAT regions. Blue/green with a 10% canary, auto-promoted after the analysis gate.

props.author: dev-kco
props.message: feat(tax): add intl VAT regions via shared taxcalc v4.12.0 (PR #1487)

props.title: billing-api 5xx after v4.12.0
props.short_description: billing-api NPE in TaxCalculator after adopting shared taxcalc

props.title: invoicing-api intermittent 5xx
props.short_description: invoicing-api same TaxCalculator NPE, lower volume

props.statement: v4.12.0 (commit abc123) introduced a NullPointerException in TaxCalculator

props.message: Cannot invoke "com.corp.geo.Region.getCode()" because the return value of "com.corp.order.Order.getRegion()" is null

confidence.basis: rollback cleared 5xx to 1% — recovery confirms the causal chain
